| Team -- this morning, Andrew Yang qualified for the fall debates. That puts _nine people_ on the stage in September. It's going to be crowded up there, so we increased our August mid-month goal to $350,000 to make sure Cory stands out. **[I know we can come together and raise $350,000 by next Wednesday, but we'll need your help to get there. Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 _\--- FORWARDED MESSAGE ---_ Team, here's a quick update on the fall Democratic debates: **FIRST:** Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, Beto O'Rourke, Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren met the DNC's 130,000 individual donor and polling requirements to qualify for the fall debates. **THEN:** This grassroots team stepped up and made sure we got there too -- and I can't thank you enough. **NOW:** Amy Klobuchar and Andrew Yang just qualified for the fall debates. With more and more candidates qualifying every day -- Andrew Yang just qualified this morning, bringing the number of candidates to nine -- we need to make sure this underdog campaign stands out. That's why my team raised our mid-month goal to $350,000 by August 15th. **[Will you chip in to help us amplify our campaign's message and reach this goal?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190808-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190808_ASD_20190808-fr-ASD-debatebump-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, and fossil fuel or pharma execs. And it's because of you that we'll be able to stand out. **[So I'm asking, will you help us raise our brand new mid-month goal of $350,000 by August 15th and make sure we have the resources to spread our message across the country?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190808-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190808_ASD_20190808-fr-ASD-debatebump-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190808-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190808_ASD_20190808-fr-ASD-debatebump-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: Sean Hannity didn't know what hit him
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
From guns to policing and reproductive rights to taxes, I told the Fox News audience what we actually stand for.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf2100a/1630b3eb/51046676/5f554d75/4238423176/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_hannity?refcode=703_org_em_fr")
Friend --
Fox News host Sean Hannity invited me onto his show this week -- and I don't think he was expecting me to stand up to him so strongly on one issue after another.
From guns to policing and reproductive rights to taxes and our Green New Deal, I told the Fox News audience what Democrats like us actually stand for. All Hannity could do was fall back on defending the status quo, the 1%, and big corporations -- not working people.
**[See why the Huffington Post says I"shredded" Sean Hannity in this video clip, then contribute $1 to support this campaign.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf2100a/1630b3eb/51046676/5f554d75/4238423176/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_hannity?refcode=703_org_em_fr")**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf2100a/1630b3eb/51046676/5f554d75/4238423176/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_hannity?refcode=703_org_em_fr")
In the wake of the recent massacres in California, Texas and Ohio, it's never been more critical to have honest conversations with people who disagree with us. Progressives like us NEED to go on highly-watched shows like Hannity's. We cannot be afraid to challenge voices on the extreme right because when we speak the truth, the country takes notice -- but only if they're watching.
With so much at stake in this election, we need a Democratic candidate for president who can go into the lion's den and fight back against right-wing talking points -- and WIN.
**[Contribute $1 today to help this campaign keep speaking to voters of all stripes about what's truly at stake for working people right now.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf2100a/1630b3eb/51046676/5f554d75/4238423176/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_hannity?refcode=703_org_em_fr")**
I spoke for about an hour on Sean Hannity's show, but just look at the impact we made. Just imagine what we can do if we all speak together in one clear voice.
Here's to speaking up,
Bill

[CONTRIBUTE»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf2100a/1630b3eb/51046676/5f554d75/4238423176/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_hannity?refcode=703_org_em_fr")
---

PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [_here_](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf2100a/1630b3eb/51046676/5f554d7f/4238423176/VEsHBA/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/unsubscribe"), but we'd hate to see you go. Learn more about [Bill's campaign](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf2100a/1630b3eb/51046676/5f554d7e/4238423176/VEsHBw/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/") here.

body:
| | Numerous policies are being suggested - we want to know what you support
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0Rh1dmBDNYWxs4Gmryp_voYbX3ZgPKZdATzwZ9bM-e0Kzii2hntb2lJC9bc9w6M1YRZZZQ_1ApKRM-8xXVpbf4KFAIJfIbMxK4RTJnxd_6tOOKKGlGgd-bMAXLf59m3rXYV06uSpeeRKtq1KNZxPespw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190809srv01&n=1)
| Peter, Our nation is grieving the loss of 31 people and 53 injured in two shootings this past weekend in Dayton, Ohio and El Paso, Texas. In the wake of this tragedy, our leaders are once again searching for solutions to the question the nation is asking: How can we prevent this from happening again? As Christians, we believe that the human heart is wicked (Jeremiah 17:9, Genesis 6:5), and we are in need of the redemption offered only by Jesus Christ and the price he paid for our sins. We know that where God is not invited to dwell, evil will persist. But as long as we remain on this earth, we know sin will exist. And so, there are necessary laws to help produce order, punish evil, and provide justice (Romans 13:4). **In the weeks and months ahead, our lawmakers will be discussing new laws to respond to these horrific events, and we want to know what you think of some of the ideas that are being proposed.** [Take our three-question survey](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0Rh1dmBDNYWxs4Gmryp_voYbX3ZgPKZdATzwZ9bM-e0Kzii2hntb2lJC9bc9w6M1YRZZZQ_1ApKRM-8xXVpbf4KFAIJfIbMxK4RTJnxd_6tOOKKGlGgd-bMAXLf59m3rXYV06uSpeeRKtq1KNZxPespw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190809srv01&n=2) and let us know what new policies, if any, you would support. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0Rh1dmBDNYWxs4Gmryp_voYbX3ZgPKZdATzwZ9bM-e0Kzii2hntb2lJC9bc9w6M1YRZZZQ_1ApKRM-8xXVpbf4KFAIJfIbMxK4RTJnxd_6tOOKKGlGgd-bMAXLf59m3rXYV06uSpeeRKtq1KNZxPespw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190809srv01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO

subject: Ivanka Trump to promote women’s initiative in South America
body:
"Ivanka Trump will travel to South America in September to focus on issues that make it difficult for women in developing countries..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=537d627af7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Ivanka Trump to promote women’s initiative in South America**

“Ivanka Trump will travel to South America in September to focus on issues that make it difficult for women in developing countries to prosper financially, including lack of access to credit and limits on employment,” Darlene Superville reports for _The Associated Press_. Ms. Trump plans to visit Paraguay and Argentina on her trip.

The visit is part of an effort to promote the Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, or W-GDP, “a program started six months ago, by focusing on three key areas: job training, financial assistance and encouraging legal and regulatory changes.”

Her trip will serve as a chance to “advocate for laws and other changes that will allow women to access courts and other institutions, build credit, own and inherit property, travel freely and work the same jobs as men.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fdaeadb025&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “When did it become acceptable for politicians, and their media helpers, to target private citizens for their political opinions? A pair of incidents this week revealed just how routine such bullying has become,” Karol Markowicz writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c602a6e411&e=3ee4985eea). “In the wake of the mass shooting in El Paso, Rep. Joaquin Castro (D-Texas) released the names of a few dozen San Antonio residents who had donated to President Trump’s re-election campaign . . . Castro was apparently unconcerned by the prospect that these people — retirees and small-business owners — would be inevitably targeted for harassment.”
---
|
---
| “Kentucky is receiving more than $9 million from a federal agency to help combat opioid addiction. Vice President Mike Pence and U.S. Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar announced the grant Thursday during a visit to Manchester, Kentucky,” the [_Courier-Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=232c735baa&e=3ee4985eea) reports. “The U.S. Department of Health and Human Services says the money will help expand access to services dealing with substance use disorder and mental health problems . . . It says the awards will support a five-point opioid strategy introduced by President Donald Trump in 2017.”
---
|
---
| “While a bilateral trade deal with China remains the ultimate goal, America doesn’t need to rush into an unbalanced agreement just for the sake of ending trade tensions. We’re in a far stronger position to wait out this negotiation than China,” former CKE Restaurants CEO Andy Puzder writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82d8dd5138&e=3ee4985eea). “A skilled negotiator like President Trump knows that you should never rush into a deal, even if the political benefits are compelling.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6549d6befe&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2c7332b35&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7c271bd282)

body:
Shooting you a quick note as our Winnebago gets ready to roll into Storm Lake, Iowa. I'm excited to sit down with Storm Lakers today and chat about the issues that matter. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771706/691c9bd/6e98a627/11a448fd/4094291401/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

Shooting you a quick note as our Winnebago rolls into Storm Lake, Iowa. I'm excited to sit down with Storm Lakers today and chat about the issues that matter. (Fun fact: the local paper, the Storm Lake Times, won a Pulitzer for its reporting two years ago. Local journalism can't be beat).

Many of the issues dominating our national conversation--like immigration and the future of our environment--are on people's minds right here in Iowa.

After today's visit, we'll push on tomorrow to the Iowa State Fair, where I hope to run into some of you. For those who can't join me, we'll send updates as I continue to travel around the country.

[**_In the meantime, we need to fund our grassroots efforts to meet voters across the nation. Help us keep the Winnebago rolling by making a donation today._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-keep-going?refcode=em_fr_20190809_JH_20190809-fr-JH-theroad-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Talk soon,
John

---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: You, me, and a strong DNC
body:
We need a president who understands that real leadership isn’t about
beating people down, but lifting people up. That’s what our campaign is
all about: lifting people up across this country, and fighting for the
best of who we are.

And when it comes to defeating Donald Trump and electing Democrats up and
down the ballot in 2020, there is one thing we absolutely cannot overlook:
we need to invest in building a strong Democratic party.

We have to work together to mobilize voters across the country to take
back the Senate and expand our House majority nationwide.

Our eventual nominee -- no matter who they are -- will need a strong
organization ready to kick in the moment the general election begins.
That’s why I’m asking you today:

Can you make a special donation today that will be split between my
campaign and the DNC’s Democratic Unity Fund?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will be automatically split between the DNC and Kamala Harris:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190809-democratic-unity?refcode=ema190809-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5907_5755789_ELE_kw&akid=5907%2E5755789%2EELE_kw ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190809-democratic-unity?refcode=ema190809-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=5907_5755789_ELE_kw&akid=5907%2E5755789%2EELE_kw ]Another Amount

Each contribution will do double duty: your contributions will help power
my campaign for president, and help ensure that Democrats up and down the
ticket have the resources they need to win in 2019, 2020, and beyond with
the backing of a strong DNC.

It may seem early to be thinking about the general election, but believe
me when I say this: The work we’ll need to win in 2020 is happening at the
DNC right now.

We have to make investments in data, technology, and cybersecurity that
keep campaigns at every level safe and give them best-in-class tools to
connect with voters; a Best Practices Institute that equips our eventual
nominee and other candidates with highly trained campaign staff; and a DNC
War Room that holds Trump accountable for his lies.

Trump and the RNC have already raised $180 million this year. That means
our programs need to be firing on all cylinders to take on Republicans’
huge political machine. Anything less than that will put our nominee for
president at a disadvantage.

Please, make a special donation split between my campaign and the
Democratic Unity Fund today. Your contribution is a commitment to making
sure Democrats at all levels have the resources they need to win:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will be automatically split between the DNC and Kamala Harris:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190809-democratic-unity?refcode=ema190809-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1011&refcode2=5907_5755789_ELE_kw&akid=5907%2E5755789%2EELE_kw ]Chip in $250 now

Together, we can have direct, tangible impacts on people’s lives across
this country. We can make real change. But it’s going to take all of us,
working together with a strong Democratic party to win.

For The People,

— Kamala Harris

body:
We just hit a big milestone in this campaign. Over the weekend, we passed 10,000 online donors, and I am so grateful to you and all of the supporters who helped us get here.
|
---
| | Derek,

We just hit a big milestone in this campaign. Over the weekend, we passed 10,000 online donors, and I am so grateful to you and all of the supporters who helped us get here.

When I heard the news, I knew I had to call and personally thank our 10,000th donor, Natasha from Richmond, for her donation.

**[Click here to see Natasha's reaction when I called](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d18b/53d9897e/51636624/1c8e4d42/2842628515/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-10000?refcode=20190809nd__165__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5") -- and if you can, please make a donation to support my reelection campaign.** _If you've saved your **On August 27th, Phoenicians will head to the polls for a special election on two ballot measures, Propositions 105 and 106. I'm urging you to VOTE NO on both measures.**

****

Proposition 105 is a Koch Brothers-backed, dark money effort that will destroy the progress we are making to ensure our communities have access to light rail and the benefits it provides.

Proposition 106 is reckless policy that endangers funding for services that help children, seniors, and our community's most vulnerable.

**We must REJECT both of these measures that will hurt our local economy and community.**

subject: Heroes in the Heartland
body:
The Indiana State Fair is now in full swing, and this year’s fair theme is particularly special for me. It’s “Heroes in the Heartland,” and it’s...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/heroes-in-the-heartland?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Heroes in the Heartland

The Indiana State Fair is now in full swing, and this year’s fair theme is particularly special for me. It’s “Heroes in the Heartland,” and it’s putting our state’s heroes – first responders, veterans, active-duty military, farmers, educators and so many others – at center stage.

I was at the fair last weekend with my son, and I had a great time not only enjoying the fair with him, but teaching him about the many Hoosiers who make sacrifices every day to keep us safe and to make this such a great place to call home. If you go out to the fair this year, I hope you take advantage of the programming and events they have planned spotlighting our Hoosier heroes.

I hope you also take a minute to stop by the Indiana Republican Party booth at the state fair. We’ve got a booth between the Covered Bridge and the Free Stage (northwest corner of the fairgrounds), and so far we’ve had Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch, Senator Todd Young, Senator Mike Braun and Congressman Greg Pence swing by. You never know who you’ll meet at our booth!

Thank you to our Hoosier heroes – and if you get a chance, make sure you enjoy the Indiana State Fair!

-Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer stopped by the party’s booth at the Indiana State Fair last weekend with his son. If you’re out at the fair, make sure to stop in and say hello!
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Helping Our Veterans & Rural Hoosiers

Governor Eric Holcomb had a busy week as he took two big steps to support Hoosier veterans (current and future), and Hoosiers living in rural areas throughout our state.

On Monday, he ceremonially signed a bill that means Indiana veterans will soon no longer pay state taxes on retirement income. The new law honors those who have served our country, while working to help attract more of these patriotic, highly-skilled vets to call Indiana home. What a great way to show our support for Hoosier veterans!

Along with supporting veterans, Governor Holcomb also showed his support for Hoosiers living in rural Indiana this week. He announced yesterday that he's providing more than $22 million in funding for broadband internet expansion. This funding will be capable of providing more than 4,800 homes and commercial locations in 12 different counties with critical internet access to power small businesses, education, agriculture, telemedicine, and so much more!

Thank you for your hard work and support this week, Governor Holcomb!

Join the Indiana GOP at the State Fair!

Planning on attending the Indiana State Fair this year? Take a moment to say hello to your Indiana Republican Party while at the fair! You might meet an Indiana elected official, and you can grab a selfie with cardboard cutouts of both President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence!

Already this week, we’ve had visits from Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch, Senator Todd Young, Senator Mike Braun and Congressman Greg Pence!

And while at booth, take a moment to sign a petition to get President Donald Trump and Governor Eric Holcomb on the ballot next year. We need to collect more than 4,500 signatures for each of them across the state – another great reason to stop by and to make sure your voice is heard.
You're Invited:
Join Governor Holcomb for the G.O.Party!
Support Governor Holcomb at an exciting evening reception with both Governor Eric Holcomb and Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer later this month!

RSVP now for the G.O.Party (http://teamholcomb.gop/goparty?mc_cid=f583a2b76f&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=287df4a60a&mc_eid=[UNIQID]&mc_cid=b01ac40a5d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !
Enjoy light drinks and snacks, live music from the band Password Reset, and celebrate with your fellow Hoosier Republicans. This big event will take place on Wednesday, August 28 at the Dallara IndyCar Factory in Speedway, Indiana!

We're all looking forward to seeing you there, so RSVP (http://teamholcomb.gop/goparty?mc_cid=f583a2b76f&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=287df4a60a&mc_eid=[UNIQID]&mc_cid=b01ac40a5d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) now!
Save the Date: Team Holcomb Fall Dinner

You’re going to want to save this date – October 14, 2019. At this year’s Team Holcomb Fall Dinner, the theme once again is Celebrating Our Military. We’ve got another great event planned for you with more details coming soon, so make sure that you save the date!

National Federation of Republican Women Convention
Coming to Indiana!

Save the date! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis this year on September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
ICE officers just detained nearly 680 people in Mississippi in the largest single-state workplace immigration raid in U.S. history.
#
ICE officers just detained nearly 680 people in Mississippi in the largest single-state workplace immigration raid in U.S. history.
The raids came just five days after a terrorist in our hometown of El Paso murdered 22 people. That same terrorist cited Donald Trump’s anti-immigrant rhetoric as inspiration for his heinous attack. He said he wanted to shoot “as many Mexicans as possible.”
Trump’s raids in Mississippi separated hundreds of children from their parents. Frightened and confused, kids as young as 11 were forced to fend for themselves. Area schools said that more than 200 immigrant kids went absent.
**These families need our help right now.**
[Can you rush a contribution to charities on the ground supporting these families? 100% of your money goes straight to the charities. This is not a campaign fundraising email.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/23968?refcode=ema20190809-47924&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=47924%2E444211%2EpXogqC)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/23968?refcode=ema20190809-47924&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=47924%2E444211%2EpXogqC)**
Especially in this moment, with our nation still reeling from a white supremacist terror attack, it’s unconsionable that the Trump administration would launch record-breaking anti-immigrant raids. But that’s exactly what they’ve done.
These actions are being done in our name as Americans — it’s on all of us to end this madness. But before we do anything else, we need to make sure these children and families are okay. That’s why we need your help right now.
[Rush a contribution to the charities helping on the ground. No matter how large or small, every donation helps in this time of need. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/23968?refcode=ema20190809-47924&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=47924%2E444211%2EpXogqC)
Thank you for stepping up today.
\- Team Beto

Folks,

We've got a plan to win in 2020 and make big, structural change in 2021 and beyond.

And here's a big piece of that plan: Making sure the Democratic party is as strong as possible.

**That 's how we'll elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight for working people. That's how we'll make our government and our economy work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.**

**[And that's why I'm asking you to please split a donation between our campaign and the DNC's Democratic Unity Fund. $3 would make a real difference to help grow our grassroots movement and help Democrats across the country.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852952c/45c30650/156172154/6683b9e8/4164436534/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRuYy1mciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1JMjRGX0RVRl9EVUZfRV8yMDE5MDgwOV9WMVMzX1BfVDEifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-dnc-fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI24F_DUF_DUF_E_20190809_V1S3_P_T1")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically processed and split between the DNC and Elizabeth Warren:_

>
Right now, the DNC needs to make powerfully important investments in the nuts and bolts that win elections -- including grassroots organizing, honing technology and tools to reach more voters and engage more volunteers, training staff, and getting our message out to hold Donald Trump accountable every day.

But those investments take real resources.

And look: Donald Trump's campaign and the RNC are already stuffing their pockets with gigantic checks from self-interested megadonors. They've already raised $180 million this year to keep propping up a corrupt system -- where the rules are rigged to benefit the wealthy and well-connected, and where working people get kicked in the teeth.

But if we fight side by side as a grassroots movement -- by chipping in what we can when we can -- we'll show the powerful special interests that change is coming, sooner than they think.

I'm going to keep fighting my heart out, but I can't do it alone.

**We need a strong DNC for Democrats to have the resources they need to win. And we need to keep the House, win back the Senate, and pick up ground in state houses to make the big, structural change we need in our country.**

[**Please chip in today to our campaign and the DNC 's Democratic Fund, and help make sure the Democratic party is in the strongest possible position to defeat Donald Trump and win up and down the ballot.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852952c/45c30650/156172154/6683b9e8/4164436534/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRuYy1mciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1JMjRGX0RVRl9EVUZfRV8yMDE5MDgwOV9WMVMzX1BfVDEifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-dnc-fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI24F_DUF_DUF_E_20190809_V1S3_P_T1")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | Did you see this? We're calling on the Senate to take up the Raise the Wage Act and ensure a $15 federal minimum wage.

[**We still need 860 people to add their name. Sign the petition now ->**](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b186/388db0e9/80ba40c/609af0d1/866161750/VEsH/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://www.paction.us/raise-the-wage/conole-for-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+We+still+need+860+people+to+add+their+na&utm_campaign=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2&source=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2")

\----Begin original message from Conole HQ----

Last month the House made history when they passed legislation to raise the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour by 2025!

This will put more money into the pockets of Central New Yorkers and give folks the dignity of a more reasonable wage for their hard work.

But we must make sure the Senate passes this legislation as well.

[**Right now, we 're taking a stand and urging the Senate to take up this legislation. Tell the Senate: It's time to raise the minimum wage!**](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b186/388db0e9/80ba40c/609af0d0/866161750/VEsE/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://www.paction.us/raise-the-wage/conole-for-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+FIRSTNAMERight+now+wersquore+taking+a+st&utm_campaign=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2&source=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2") [SIGN THE PETITION](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b186/388db0e9/80ba40c/609af0df/866161750/VEsF/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://www.paction.us/raise-the-wage/conole-for-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+THE+PETITION&utm_campaign=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2&source=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2") This legislation won't just help Central New Yorkers -- it'll give 34 million Americans a raise.

It'll ensure that our workers have more money to cover basic necessities and help push our economy forward.

[**Be one of the 2,500 supporters we need to sign our petition and tell the Senate to pass the Raise the Wage Act ->**](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b186/388db0e9/80ba40c/609af0de/866161750/VEsC/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://www.paction.us/raise-the-wage/conole-for-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Be+one+of+the+2500+supporters+we+need+to&utm_campaign=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2&source=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190809_1_2")

Thanks,

All of us at Conole HQ

|
---|---|---

|
---

name: Cory Booker
subject: Four more years of Donald Trump isn't an option, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, If we want to make lasting change in this country, we need a strong, united Democratic Party. Our Democratic nominee will be up against a very well-funded incumbent president. But if we want to beat Donald Trump, we cannot afford to take our foot off the gas: defeating Donald Trump is only the floor, not the ceiling. After we win in 2020, we're still going to need Democrats at all levels of government to fight for affordable health care, voting rights, and criminal justice reform. **This is why I 'm asking you to split a donation between our campaign and the DNC's Democratic Unity Fund.** The RNC has already stockpiled millions upon millions of dollars to help Donald Trump win a second term. In the last fundraising quarter alone, Trump's campaign and the RNC raised over $100 million. **That 's alarming, team.** I wish I could say that our party was able to match that number, but unfortunately, we still have work to do. [**So that 's why I'm asking, can you split a donation between our grassroots campaign and the DNC's Democratic Unity Fund today?**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190809-dncsplit-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190809_CB_20190809-fr-CB-DNCsplit-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") By investing in the DNC, I believe that we truly can compete everywhere and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Now is the time to build our party's bench so that the progressive leaders of today and tomorrow have the resources they need to win. As the RNC is spending millions hiring staff and building party infrastructure, we're in danger of falling behind. It's also vital that the DNC has the funding for important investments in data and technology to respond to cybersecurity threats that have become all too common in our elections. I know it's hard to believe that this is the reality here, but we need to be prepared. [**Please make a donation today in support of my campaign and the DNC 's efforts to help our party win back the White House and the Senate next November.**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190809-dncsplit-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190809_CB_20190809-fr-CB-DNCsplit-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") With a revitalized Democratic Party, we will end the national nightmare that has been the Trump presidency and lead our country toward a better future. Thank you,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190809-dncsplit-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190809_CB_20190809-fr-CB-DNCsplit-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&irstname=&astname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
